title: Ledger
description: Append-only ledger of attestations (receipts) produced by Factory.

run_id.description: Unique execution identifier for this governance run.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for the claim being evaluated.

policy_hash.description: Pinned policy version hash (must match briefcase policy_hash).

attestations.description: List of attestations (receipts) produced by Factory.

ledger_digest.description: SHA256 hash of canonical ledger (for replay verification).

factory_version.description: Factory code version that produced this ledger.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when ledger was finalized.

metadata.description: Optional non-sovereign metadata for audit trail.
